block_00: Trading with the Flag chart pattern
block_01: This simple chart pattern indicates a great opportunity for traders: the possibility of riding a long trend and getting more profit. The earlier one notices the flag, the more chances to enter a deal sooner.
block_02: It can be noticed after a breakout or during a strong trending market, when a consolidation happens. Most importantly, it is universally applicable to any asset and timeframe on a candlestick chart.
block_03: Learn how to spot the Flag and remember this pattern for your future deals!
